schema_output.narrative_text: Ḥāṭib ibn Abī Balta ʿ ah sets out on a long journey to Egypt. He is determined to complete his mission.
schema_output.image_prompt: Children's watercolor storybook illustration, soft warm hand-painted style for ages 6-12. A vast, arid desert landscape under a clear blue morning sky with the sun rising in the distance, casting a warm golden light across the sandy dunes. The horizon stretches out to the right, curving slightly, with a few rocky outcroppings and sparse desert vegetation in the distance. In the foreground, a lone figure walks away from the city, seen entirely from behind: medium build, determined walking posture, wearing a simple white thobe and a brown woolen cloak with a white cloth head covering. The figure is small in the vast expanse of the desert, emphasizing the sense of journey and determination. Soft warm golden light, sense of movement and freedom. Medium shot from behind the figure, capturing the vastness of the desert landscape. Warm beige, sandy, and golden palette with the brown cloak as a color anchor. No modern objects, historically accurate 7th century scene.
